name: 6 Weeks to Six-Pack Abs
description: A 2-phase abs program by JefitTeam. Weeks 1-3: high reps to burn fat around the core. Weeks 4-6: increased resistance to build defined, fuller abs with oblique focus.

exercises.notes: Hold a weight plate on your chest. Full crunch — lift shoulder blades off the floor. Exhale hard at the top. High reps burn fat around upper abs.
Kneel on a mat, grip the barbell. Roll out slowly until hips nearly touch floor, pull back using core only. One of the best full core exercises.
Hang from a pull-up bar. Raise legs until parallel to floor or higher. Avoid swinging. Targets lower abs and hip flexors.
Set bench at 30-45 degree decline. Hands behind head. Slow controlled movement. Full range of motion — crunch all the way up, lower slowly.
Kneel facing cable machine. Grip rope attachment behind head. Crunch torso down toward knees. Keep hips stationary. Squeeze at the bottom.
Hold dumbbell in one hand. Bend sideways as far as possible. Return to upright. Work one side at a time. Targets obliques for a carved waist.
Stand sideways to cable machine with a low pulley. Grip the handle and bend away from the cable. Full oblique stretch, squeeze at the top.
Hang from pull-up bar with ankle weights or dumbbell between feet. Raise knees to chest. Added weight builds lower ab size and strength faster.
Decline bench with weight plate on chest. More resistance than weeks 1-3. Slow controlled descent. Maximum contraction at the top.
Rope attachment on high cable. Pull elbows toward knees. Heavier weight than phase 1. Focus on full contraction at the bottom to build size and definition.
